title: lilium armenum
intro: Lilium armenum, also known as Armenian lily or Lilium armeniacum, is a species of flowering plant in the lily family (Liliaceae). This perennial plant has medicinal properties, with its bulbs containing glycosides, flavonoids, and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lilium armenum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Lilium armenum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for use in medicinal applications.
